description: Exact generated-image subset copied from the public RBT4DNN artifact; provenance metadata only, not a redistribution grant.

source.license_note: No upstream repository license was found during the publication audit. Fetch directly from the authors' public artifact; do not repackage or redistribute without permission. CelebA-family restrictions may also apply.
